metric_caveats: Monthly-frequency, Purist category, and Pragmatic category metrics are benchmark-facing.
Raw exact, normalized-label exact, schema validity, abstention, and evidence support are diagnostic.
Verifier decisions (confirm/repair/abstain) and reasons are preserved in prediction metadata.
Artifact-bridge surface normalization is applied identically to direct and verify-repair variants.

Compare against synthesis-backed baseline runs/gan_s0_synthesis_bootstrap_full_validation_gpt4_1_mini_20260518T065115Z and cap-25 v2 inspection docs/gan_s0_verify_repair_cap25_v2_inspection_20260519.md.
This full fixed synthetic validation run is not a published Gan benchmark reproduction.
